Records.authors: Martin, Stephen P., Robertson, David G.
Records.description: Two-loop master self-energy integral with five propagators (double-triangle/spectacles topology) in d=4-2*eps. Denoted M(x,y,z,u,v) in the TSIL basis. Top-level master integral in the Tarasov reduction.
Records.location: eq.(2.15) for bold M(x,y,z,u,v), or eq.(2.27) for finite M(x,y,z,u,v)

Records.description: Two-loop self-energy master diagram T12345 with five arbitrary internal masses. Imaginary part via Appell F1 and Lauricella F_D functions. Full integral via one-dimensional dispersion representation.

Records.authors: Giroux, Mathieu, Pokraka, Andrzej, Porkert, Franziska, Sohnle, Yoann
Records.description: The 5-mass kite family of two-loop self-energy Feynman integrals in d=2-2eps dimensions with five distinct internal masses. Contains two elliptic subsectors from (123)-sunrise and (345)-sunrise subtopologies. Authors construct epsilon-form basis via gauge transformations leveraging SL(2,Z) covariance and pull back the DE onto the moduli space of two punctured tori.

Records.authors: Gracey, John A., Peláez, Marcela, Reinosa, Urko, Tissier, Matthieu
Records.description: Two-loop self-energy family for gluon/ghost propagators in Curci-Ferrari model. Each m_i in {0,m} gives 32 mass sectors. 31 two-loop master integrals evaluated numerically via TSIL. Includes 16 gluon and 6 ghost diagrams.
